summary: The diff implements REQ-1 fully. The Layout component has been updated to split 'Cleanio' into two spans: 'Clean' with 'text-brand-orange' and 'io' with 'text-white'. The bike logo image remains beside the wordmark. The same two-tone styling is also applied in the footer. No files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/ were modified.
